programs.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programs.sub_title: The Kidnap and Murder of an Heiress
programs.desc: Jackie Malton speaks to investigators and witnesses from the 1969 kidnap of Muriel McKay, hoping to shed new light on the mystery.

programs.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programs.sub_title: The Untold Secrets of Cromwell Street
programs.desc: Jackie Malton tells previously untold stories from Crowell Street, including the first full-length interviews from those inside the interrogations of the Wests.

programs.title: The Killer Within
programs.desc: In 2017, firefighters discover the burned body of French au pair Sophie Lionnet in a London garden; it soon comes to light that her life had been taken by the couple she worked for.
